name: Beyond the Veil
description: Your soul is bound to the space beyond the veil, and you derive your energy from it. You cannot be in the realm of the living for long.

badges.text: You can return to the veil to refocus by phasing through Sculk.
Your primary ability cannot be used when veiled.
Fire damage will follow you beyond the veil!

element.command: tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: greetings.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: fancy seeing you here.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: rise and shine.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: hey there. it has been a while.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: nice to see your face again.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: coming back for more?","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: you just can not get enough, can you?","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: welcome back. you were missed.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: do not think that what you owe will subside any time soon.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: back to work.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: welcome home.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: hi again.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: hey.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: your debt is due.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: weak.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: pathetic.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: there were higher standards for you.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: you were expected to perform better.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: useless.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: incompetent.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: is this what you have become?","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: really living up to that old title, huh?","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: try harder.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: you are capable of better.","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
tellraw @s [{"text":"👁","bold":true,"color":"black"},{"text":" whispers to you: this is your performance without a tool?","italic":true,"color":"gray","bold":false}]
